positive: A sophisticated, stylized illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) amidst glowing geometric constellations and swirling nebulae. The fox should be rendered with clean, sharp silhouettes and dynamic, elegant poses. The color palette should utilize deep indigo, ethereal cyan, vibrant gold, and cosmic magenta, creating high contrast against a dark, starry background. The composition must be centered and balanced, making the fox the central focal point. Use a neo-traditional tattoo art style blended with cosmic sci-fi aesthetics, ensuring clean lines suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on symmetry and mystic energy. High contrast, detailed linework, vector illustration quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, ugly, worst quality, messy, dirty, grain, amateur, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, blurry background, photorealism, realistic, cartoonish, logos, signatures
